brand_identity.name: AriesHitX v3.5
brand_identity.description: A premium payment automation dashboard with a high-end glassmorphism aesthetic.
brand_identity.target_audience: Automation power users, tech-savvy, 'hacker' aesthetic admirers.

layout.structure: Single-page dashboard with floating glass panels.
layout.grid_system: Bento Grid: Mixed span sizes (col-span-1, col-span-2) for widget density.
layout.spacing: Generous gaps (gap-6) to allow the glass effect to breathe.

StatusToggle.description: Large, central toggle switch with neon glow. Green for ON, Red/Gray for OFF.
StatusToggle.styles: w-full h-16 rounded-full glass-panel flex items-center justify-between px-2 cursor-pointer transition-all

BinInput.description: Central feature. Large input field with a 'Blue Box' scanner effect on focus/hover.
BinInput.styles: h-14 bg-black/50 border-blue-500/30 text-lg focus:border-blue-400 focus:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)] placeholder:text-blue-500/30

LogsPanel.description: Terminal-style scrolling log window. Monospace font. Timestamps.
LogsPanel.styles: font-mono text-xs bg-black/80 border-t-2 border-purple-500/50 h-64 overflow-y-auto p-4 rounded-b-xl

GlassCard.description: The fundamental building block. Used for every section.
GlassCard.styles: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-md shadow-2xl

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME ENFORCEMENT: The entire app must be DARK MODE. Force `dark` class on the html/body.
2. BRANDING: Use 'AriesHitX v3.5' in the header. Do NOT display 'Emergent' anywhere.
3. GLASS EFFECT: Every container (card, sidebar, modal) must use the glassmorphism utility classes defined in visual_enhancers.
4. ANIMATIONS: Use `framer-motion` for entrance animations (staggered fade-in) and hover effects (scale, glow).
5. CUSTOM COMPONENTS: Do not use raw Shadcn components. Wrap them or style them with the glass classes. E.g., a Shadcn Button must have `backdrop-blur` and a translucent border.
6. SPECIFIC BUTTONS: Ensure there are two distinct Telegram buttons: 'Main Channel' and 'Charity Channel'.
7. LAYOUT: Use a 'Bento Grid' layout for the main dashboard area. Status toggle at the top or prominent.
8. LOGS: The logs section should look like a hacker terminal - scrolling text, different colors for [SUCCESS], [FAIL], [INFO].
9. BACKGROUND: Use a deep, dark gradient background, optionally overlaying the 'background_texture' with low opacity (mix-blend-overlay).
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
